g.text: Read the marks slowly for a message.
Take the goat track down to {COVE}.
Study {A2_FIND} and read the tide pools.
Search the rocks for a way inland.
Cut away from the water into the trees.
Drop to the pale gleam in {B3_SIGN}.
Climb the stony trail toward the camp.
Push on along the cairned ridge.
Stop here, daunted by the height.
Come down to the level shelf.
Make the final pull to the camp.
Leave the box and climb back up.
Pocket the locket and hurry on.
Follow Alder's notes toward the camp.
Climb the stream upward against the flow...
Explore a side rift lit with glowworms.
Edge along the dry ledge to the light.
Climb the daylight shaft to the spring.
Push past toward a further glow.
Follow the ochre mark toward the spring.
Fill a whole page with the old painting.
Follow the passage toward the lapping wa...
Back away and leave the warm dark.
Mark {C3_FIND} and climb toward the ligh...
Try to coax {C3_FIND} out alone now.
Pry up a loose slab in the floor.
Follow the headland path to the ridge.
Cross the ridge toward the camp.
Take rope and oil and climb back out.
Follow the draft toward the ridge camp.
Follow the chalk line to the ridge.
Search the strand line near shore.
Pick across the dark mussel beds.
Sketch fast, then run for shore.
Linger over the wreck too long.
Climb the stream toward the falls.
Leave it and read the shoreline.
Set out inland for the ridge camp.
Keep the note as a find and stop here.
Search the cove's tide pools and sea cav...
Rest too long in the calm cove.
Press straight on up to the ridge.
Copy it quickly and climb on.
Copy it in full and go no further.
Fill the flask and climb toward the ridg...
Trace the streams to understand the whol...
Climb to the ridge camp with the water m...
Cross the meadow to the camp trail.
Note the boundary mark and climb to the ...
Copy the boundary survey in full and res...
Take up the tools and ready to finish it...
Simply copy {ALDER_CHART} and call it do...
Gather the tools and ready to climb on.
Follow the cairns the safe way.
Cross the boulder field to the rise.
Set up to survey the whole island now.
Signal the far ship first with {PREDECES...
Just stand and take it all in.
Take careful sightings of every coast.
Fix the reef and cove for safe landings ...
Gather the sketches to draw the final ch...
Push on toward the full masterwork.
Stop with the safe-landing chart done.
Ink the final chart in bold clean lines.
Pencil it soft and add every small detai...
Copy it twice, one to keep and one to gi...
Fuss over one last detail as the sun sin...
Name it for {PREDECESSOR} who came befor...
Name it for both mapmakers together.
Ring the margins with the island's livin...
Leave the banner blank and sign the surv...
Present both to show a surveyor's care.
Give one and keep the spare quietly.
Aim the mirror and flash the ship.
Signal, then turn back to finish the cha...
Hold the flash steady and wait.
Race down toward the cove to meet the bo...
Meet the boat at the cove.
Lead them to {C3_FIND} in the cave.
Lead them to {A2_FIND} on the reef.
Trust it too far, too fast.
Take the firm path up toward the creek.
Sit and map {A4_FIND2} in loving detail.
Climb the wet rocks beside the falls.
Cross the mossy log above the lip.
Step off onto the upper traverse.
Note the gauge and climb the falls.
Climb the rock slope toward the light.
Chimney up steadily to the surface.
Rush the chimney and tire too soon.
Follow where the searcher went, toward t...
Read the wall of pinned charts.
Study the wall of a mapmaker's whole lif...
Mark the tangled pup to send help later.
Hurry through the gully to the cliff gap...
Dawdle reading the weed lines too long.
Add the far shore and gather the whole s...
Stop, thrilled, having charted the unkno...
Add the living island to the margins.
Hand over the clean masterwork as it is.
Count the nests in the rookery.
Copy the bearings and take the plank wal...
Copy the entire carved tide table in ful...
Follow the firm ribbon to the far channe...
Cut straight across and startle the floc...
Sketch the rookery and cross to the mud ...
Stay to watch the whole colony too long.
Trust the frayed upper rungs and hurry.
Take bearings from the platform and clim...
Linger in the swaying green crown too lo...
Record the shrine and climb on toward th...
Sit long in the green hush before the sh...
Push off hard and pole in haste.
Climb the flowstone stair toward the day...
Record the stone footprints and climb ou...
Map every ancient footprint on the beach...
Give up on the dead beacon and turn back...
Copy Alder's last message and cross to t...
Copy the dial's bearings and cross to th...
Copy every single bearing on the great d...
Wade in quickly for a look at the cargo.
Push your luck deep in the flooding hold...
Note the settler ship and wade on to the...
Stay to read the whole story of the wrec...
Sketch the flats from the high stern and...
Stay on the bow to draw {E5_FIGUREHEAD} ...
Sit with Alder's kind hidden note.
Add the reef edge and climb toward the r...
Map every last pool in jewelled detail.
Photograph the glowworms in memory and s...
Force it in a panicky rush.
Follow the easy way to the spring.
Stay lost in the glowing dark too long.
Doze in the secret green room.
Add your mark and climb to the upper rid...
Read every name carved in the old bench.
Lever the seized lock by main force.
Take the tools and {D1_LETTER} and climb...
Wallow too long in the soft dunes.
Take the whole flats in one view and fol...
Stay on the breezy dune drawing every ch...
